docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF NIKOLA CVETKOVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAILEY O'NEILE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
